ETH_UCY.caveat: Calibration uses validation source ADE labels only; test is evaluated once. Future waypoints remain train/val/test labels only and are never inference inputs. Dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D only; no Stage5C/SMC/metric/seconds/true-3D/foundation claim.

TrajNet.caveat: Calibration uses validation source ADE labels only; test is evaluated once. Future waypoints remain train/val/test labels only and are never inference inputs. Dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D only; no Stage5C/SMC/metric/seconds/true-3D/foundation claim.
